title: The --hierarchical option causes failure with "--make gmake" option: Unsupported: unpacked arrays with protect-lib on 'val'
body:
```
%Error-UNSUPPORTED: x.v:36:16: Unsupported: unpacked arrays with protect-lib on 'val'
   36 | input[31:0]  val[5:0];
      |              ^~~~~~
```

This failure doesn't happen without the ```--hierarchical``` option, and also with the ```--hierarchical``` option with ```--make cmake```.
